name: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
original_name: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
overview: Martin Clunes embarks on an epic ocean wide adventure in search of the real Pacific. His voyage is inspired by reading a book given to him when he was a child by his father about the Kon-Tiki expedition across the Pacific. Martin has always yearned to follow in those explorers' footsteps.
